case_title: PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK VS. HARRIS TRISTANO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $161.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TRISTANO, HARRIS AN INDIVIDUAL
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRISTANO, HARRIS AN INDIVIDUAL $5,128.65 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $358.31 INTEREST, $161.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,308.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
AFFIDAVIT OF PLAINTIFF PURSUANT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK SERVED MAY-14-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRISTANO, HARRIS AN INDIVIDUAL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT TRISTANO, HARRIS AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-06-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-02-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-08-2002
